items.name: Invoke
items.source_story_title: Computer Use is 45x more expensive than structured APIs
items.summary: macOS accessibility layer that turns app actions into workflows.
items.why_included: Commenters framed it as a practical API over macOS apps, not a browser hack.
items.evidence: A commenter said it gives agents a small set of tools for accessible macOS apps, writes repeatable workflows, and can run commands like `invoke chrome pinTab`.

items.name: Spectral
items.source_story_title: Computer Use is 45x more expensive than structured APIs
items.summary: API-traffic capture tool that generates MCP tools from apps.
items.why_included: It was explicitly recommended as a way to turn real app traffic into reusable agent tools.
items.evidence: A commenter said Spectral captures traffic while you browse, understands what each call does, and generates MCP tools any AI agent can call.

items.name: clipper.dev
items.source_story_title: Docker 29 has changed its default image store for new installs
items.summary: Container registry and pull client tuned for huge ML images.
items.why_included: The builder presented it as a direct fix for Docker’s large-image sharing pain.
items.evidence: The author said clipper.dev breaks registry layers into content-addressed chunks so shared bytes are reused instead of redownloading whole layers.

items.name: Pass4Wallet
items.source_story_title: iOS 27 is adding a 'Create a Pass' button to Apple Wallet
items.summary: iPhone app for loyalty cards, IDs, and custom Wallet passes.
items.why_included: A commenter said it still beats native passes for customization.
items.evidence: A commenter said they have used Pass4Wallet for years, like the custom gate-code support, and expect to keep using it.

items.name: Vocaela
items.source_story_title: GLM-5V-Turbo: Toward a Native Foundation Model for Multimodal Agents
items.summary: Tiny 500M vision-language model for GUI clicking and control.
items.why_included: It stood out as a small model that actually handled x,y clicking well.
items.evidence: A commenter said Vocaela, a tiny 500M model, is quite good at x,y clicking when larger models hallucinate coordinates.

items.name: Waterfox
items.source_story_title: Google Chrome silently installs a 4 GB AI model on your device without consent
items.summary: Firefox fork browser for people leaving Chrome and Mozilla.
items.why_included: Several commenters named it as their Chrome escape hatch.
items.evidence: Commenters said they switched to Waterfox after getting sick of Mozilla and framed it as a practical alternative to the Google browser monopoly.

items.name: Big Clive
items.source_story_title: EEVblog: The 555 Timer is 55 years old [video]
items.summary: YouTube livestream celebrating the 555 timer’s 55th year.
items.why_included: It was linked as the live birthday watch-along for the 555 milestone.
items.evidence: A commenter posted Big Clive’s livestream and said it was the celebration for the 555’s birthday.

items.name: Van Gogh Studio
items.source_story_title: Show HN: Explore color palettes inspired by 3000 master painter artworks
items.summary: Article on the original colors behind Van Gogh’s paintings.
items.why_included: Commenters recommended it as context for why the palettes looked brownish.
items.evidence: A commenter linked Van Gogh Studio and noted that many old pigments were unstable, so the palettes in the show thread were misleadingly muted.
